markdown.headingText: Invited Talks, Conference Presentations, and Seminars
markdown.markdown:
### 2025

- **Hiding a Group of Nodes from Unsupervised Graph Learning-Based Clustering**  
  Mathematics in Computation Seminar Series, Oak Ridge National Laboratory, Oak Ridge, TN, August 2025.

- WIP: **Modeling Organizational Resilience: A Network-Based Simulation for Analyzing Recovery and Disruption of Ransomware Operations**  
  Cambridge Cybercrime Conference, Cambridge, UK, June 2025.  
  [Conference program](https://www.cambridgecybercrime.uk/conference2025.html) · [Liveblog mention](https://www.lightbluetouchpaper.org/2025/06/25/cambridge-cybercrime-conference-2025-liveblog/)

- **Relationships Matter: Modeling Dynamics of Cybercriminal Commodity-Based Groups Using Linguistic Analysis and Theories of Organization**  
  Cybersecurity at MIT Sloan, CAMS, January 2025.


### 2024

- **Relationships Matter: Linguistic Analysis behind the Organizational Dynamics of a Ransomware Gang**
  Cognitive Security Institute, October 2024.  
  [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wsrS2Gfxmyo)

- **Relationships Matter: Reconstructing the Organizational Structure of a Ransomware Group**  
  APWG Symposium on Electronic Crime Research, Boston, MA, September 2024.

- **Relationships Matter: Reconstructing the Organizational and Social Structure of a Ransomware Gang** 
  Black Hat USA, Las Vegas, NV, August 2024.  
  [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2hx4oq_kaI8) · [Black Hat briefing](https://www.blackhat.com/us-24/briefings/schedule/#relationships-matter-reconstructing-the-organizational-and-social-structure-of-a-ransomware-gang-39725) · [Podcast interview](https://redefining-society-podcast.simplecast.com/episodes/reconstructing-the-organizational-and-social-structure-of-a-ransomware-gang-a-black-hat-usa-2024-conversation-with-l-jean-camp-and-dalya-manatova-on-location-coverage-with-sean-martin-and-marco-ciappelli-sGyQ7b_7)

- **Relationships Matter: Reconstructing the Organizational Structure of a Ransomware Group**  
  Cybersecurity Seminar Series, USC Information Sciences Institute, Marina del Rey, CA, June 2024.  
  [Event page](https://www.isi.edu/events/5021/relationships-matter-reconstructing-the-organizational-structure-of-a-ransomware-group/)

- **Relationships Matter: Reconstructing the Organizational Structure of a Ransomware Group**
  Cambridge Cybercrime Conference, Cambridge, UK, June 2024.  
  [Conference program](https://www.cambridgecybercrime.uk/conference2024.html) · [Liveblog](https://www.lightbluetouchpaper.org/2024/06/11/cambridge-cybercrime-conference-2024-liveblog/)

- **Relationships Matter: Reconstructing the Organizational Structure of a Ransomware Group**
  Workshop on the Economics of Information Security, Dallas, TX, April 2024.  

- **Social, Linguistic, and Organizational Analyses of Russian eCrime Forums**
  Cybersecurity Seminar, Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology, Terre Haute, IN, April 2024.  
  [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B1Pm7Bh-Gdg)

- **Building and Testing a Network of Social Trust in an Underground Forum**  
  HotSoS Symposium, April 2024.

- **Organizational and Social Dynamics of a Cybercriminal Group: A Case of Russian Ransomware Gang**  
  Research Series Talk, Ostrom Workshop, Bloomington, IN, March 2024.  
  [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ajajc5otsp4)

- **Social, Linguistic, and Organizational Analyses of Russian eCrime Forums**  
  M3AAWG, San Francisco, CA, February 2024.



### 2023

- **Social Network of Crimes on Dark Web**  
  Cybersecurity Summer Institute, Georgia Tech, Atlanta, GA, May 2023.


### 2022

- **Exploring Social Network of Trust Across Major Crime Types in an Underground Forum**  
  APWG Symposium on Electronic Crime Research, November 2022.
